sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71671" key="coanhfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξοᾰν-ηφόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">image-bearer</tr_> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ξοανηφόροι,</foreign> title of a play by Sophocles.</sense> </entryFree>
